commands.name: activate

arguments.name: identifier
arguments.description: Identity ID or email to activate

commands.description: Mark an identity as active and update auth.json

commands.name: import

options.name: --folder
options.description: Folder path to scan (defaults to Codex folder)

commands.description: Scan and import *auth.json files from the Codex folder

arguments.name: identifiers
arguments.description: One or more identity IDs or emails to remove

commands.name: rollback

options.name: --version
options.description:
Version number to rollback to (defaults to previous
version)

arguments.name: identifier
arguments.description:
Identity ID, email, or leave empty for active 
identity

commands.description: Restore a previous version of an identity

commands.name: show

arguments.name: identifier
arguments.description:
Identity ID, email, or leave empty for active 
identity

commands.description: Show identity details (current one by default)

commands.name: stats

options.name: --refresh
options.description: Refresh stats from Codex before displaying

arguments.name: identifier
arguments.description:
Identity ID, email, 'all' for all users, or 
leave empty for active identity

commands.description:
Retrieve and save current usage statistics (5h limit, 
weekly limit)

arguments.name: identifier
arguments.description:
Identity ID, email, or leave empty for active 
identity
